details: IEEE 64B/66B exact block expansion
128 original bits; serializer owns pre-encoding activity
132 encoded bits; CDR ownership included
No independent rate conversion exists in frozen runner
One encoded E/O action
One encoded O/E action
Mux and demux enter loss budget only
Waveguide enters propagation loss only
1 mW x 1 ns = 1 pJ
Profile resonator count for one lane and one ns
Doubling encoded bits doubles E/O dynamic energy
Doubling active time doubles laser energy
Four provisioned TX lanes consume four per-lane equivalents
